rulings.Case Title: PRESLEY C. CHAN et al VS. PRESTON PAUL CHAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 2, 2014, Line 1: DEFENDANTS PRESTON CHAN'S and WOV INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to September 30, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and provide courtesy copy of demurrer and the operative complaint to department 501 no later than September 5, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE, SUCCES VS. LYNDA C.V. SAKEANGVIRAT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reconsideration Of The Denial Of The Motion To Strike To Strike Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 2, 2014, Line 2: DEFENDANT BRIAN HEATH'S Motion For Reconsideration Of The Denial Of The Motion To Strike To Strike Complaint. Continued to September 3, 2014 to be heard by the Honorable Lillian K. Sing in Department 306 at 9:30 a.m. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JEAN CLAUDE LAIR DBA CABLE CAR HOTEL VS. MARTHA M. HAGEMIER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 2, 2014, Line 3: DEFENDANT MARTHA HAGEMIER'S Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession. Subject to (1) Defendant presenting proof of service for the motion; (2) Plaintiff's opposition; (3) posting of $3,530 with the Court no later than September 2, 2014; and (4) Defendant filing answer no later than September 2, 2014. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 2, 2014, Line 4: PLAINTIFF BRAZIL INVESTMENTS, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: DHARMESH PATEL VS. TIMOTHY CLARK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 2, 2014, Line 10: DEFENDANT TIMOTHY CLARK'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. subject to (1) Defendant providing at the hearing a letter/declaration from the doctor addressing the flu visit/treatment; (2) posting of $2,247.14 with the Court no later than September 2, 2014; and (3) Defendant filing answer no later than September 2, 2014. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MEHER PATEL DBA DRAKE HOTEL VS. JULIAN BIANCO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 2, 2014, Line 6: DEFENDANT JULIAN BIANCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to address the discrepancy in allegations regarding the amount of rent owed in the Notice and in paragraph 10 of the First Amended Complaint. Demurer is otherwise overruled. Moving party and its counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE J CARR VS. ANTOINETTE WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 2, 2014, Line 8: DEFENDANTS ANTOINETTE WILLIAMS, ALTON MAGEE, AND PATRICK WATKINS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
